title: Method for producing a porous silicium carbide ceramic body and the porous silicium carbide ceramic body obtained
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for the production of a porous ceramic body, the method comprises the following steps: (i) selecting a ceramic powder; (ii) selecting a binder comprising a pre-ceramic polymer; (iii) mixing the ceramic powder from step (i) with the binder from step (ii) providing a ceramic composition; (iv) coating a porous support with the ceramic composition providing a ceramic coated porous support; (v) heating the ceramic coated porous support to a temperature between 500Ă‹ÂšC-1500Ă‹ÂšC producing the porous ceramic body.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A method for the production of a porous ceramic body, the method comprises the following steps: (i) selecting a ceramic powder; (ii) selecting a binder comprising a pre-ceramic polymer; (iii) mixing the ceramic powder from step (i) with the binder from step (ii) providing a ceramic composition; (iv) coating a porous support with the ceramic composition providing a ceramic coated porous support; (v) heating the ceramic coated porous support to a temperature between 500Ă‚Â°C- 1500Ă‚Â°C producing the porous ceramic body. 2. The method according to anyone of the preceding claims, wherein an organic solvent is added to the binder selected in step (ii). 3. The method according to anyone of the preceding claims, wherein the air surrounding the ceramic coated porous support during the heating in step (v) is substituted with one or more inert gas/gases, preferably, nitrogen or argon. 4. The method according to the present invention, wherein the porous ceramic body obtained in step (v) is subjected to a step of oxidization. 5. A method according to anyone of the preceding claims, wherein the porous ceramic body is a microfiltration membrane or an ultrafiltration membrane. 6. A porous ceramic body obtainable by a method according to anyone of claims 1-5. 7. A porous ceramic body comprising crystal-like ceramic grains. 8. The porous ceramic body according to anyone of claims 6 or 7, wherein the porous ceramic body is a porous liquid ceramic body. 9. The porous ceramic body according to anyone of claims 6-8, wherein the porous ceramic body, or the porous liquid ceramic body is a porous water ceramic body. 10. The porous ceramic body according to anyone of claims 6-9, wherein the porous 5 ceramic body has a mean pore size in the range of 0.04-2 ĂŽÂĽĂŽÂ·ĂŽÂ·. 11. The porous ceramic body according to anyone of claims 610, wherein the porous ceramic body does not comprise a mixture of potassium feldspar, kaolin and quartz 10 12. The porous ceramic body according to anyone of claims 611, wherein the porous ceramic body has a porosity in the range of 25-75%, e.g. in the range of 30-65%, such as in the of 35-55%, e.g. in the range of 40-45%. 13. The porous ceramic body according to anyone of claims 6-12, wherein the crystal-like 15 ceramic grains are not melted together. 14. Use of the porous ceramic body according to claims 6-13, or the porous ceramic body obtainable by a method according to anyone of claims 1-5, in a microfiltration or an ultrafiltration. 20
